task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Moodle course page for 'World History' (or HIST201).

task_completion.description: Add a 'Calendar' block to the course sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Calendar block (showing a monthly calendar view) is visible in the sidebar of the course interface.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Text' block to the course sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Text (or HTML) block is visible in the sidebar of the course interface.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Text' block with the title 'Course Support'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The header/title of the newly added Text block explicitly reads 'Course Support'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Text' block with the content 'Email: help@history.edu'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body content of the 'Course Support' Text block explicitly displays 'Email: help@history.edu'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure the blocks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Moodle web interface (e.g., clicking 'Turn editing on', 'Add a block'), rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows the correct local Moodle address, and the interface matches standard Moodle styling, not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the block appearance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open in the final screenshots showing the completed task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target course is 'World History' (shortname: HIST201). The required blocks are the 'Calendar' block (calendar_month) and the 'Text' block (html). The Text block must have the exact title 'Course Support' and the exact content 'Email: help@history.edu'.
